case_title: RM ROY TRANSPORTATION, INC. VS. MARCELINO DERRELL FLORES ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RM ROY TRANSPORTATION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-29-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RM ROY TRANSPORTATION INC REPRESENTED BY RAFAEL GOMES. DEFENDANT MARCELINO DERRELL FLORES DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT BAY AREA HUNKS INC. DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 29, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT; PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THIS MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RM ROY TRANSPORTATION, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCELINO DERRELL AKA MARCELINO FLORES BAY AREA HUNKS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $225.00) SERVED FEB-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCELINO DERRELL AKA MARCELINO FLORES
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA HUNKS, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RM ROY TRANSPORTATION, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $225.00) SERVED FEB-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCELINO DERRELL AKA MARCELINO FLORES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RM ROY TRANSPORTATION, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA HUNKS, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,150.00, DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CO-DEFENDANT MARCELINO DERRELL FLORES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCELINO DERRELL AKA MARCELINO FLORES BAY AREA HUNKS, INC.
